[New Content]
● Awakener "Murphy: Fauxborn"
    ○ Luminis Rank, HP 97.
    ○ Exalt "Princess of Delusions": Consumes 100 points of Aliemus. All enemies will receive 50% of the damage as a Sacrifice after taking Active DMG this turn, and gain +4 Temporary Amplification.
    ○ Skill "Illusory Favor": Arithmetica Cost 0. Grants all allies 20 Aliemus, Arithmetica Limit -1 
    ○ Skill "Abyssal Rebirth": Arithmetica Cost 3. Grants all allies 12 Shield and triggers Sacrifice for all enemies.
    ○ Skill "Lemuria Ritual": Arithmetica Cost 2. Randomly inflict 3 times 5 DMG and apply an equal amount of Sacrifice.
    ○ State "Sacrifice": Triggers at the end of the turn, taking passive damage equal to the number of stacks and removing half of the stacks, cannot be dispelled.
    ○ State "Birth Ritual": Each layer grants a Sacrifice of 1% of damage taken after receiving Active DMG.
● WoD and Posse
    ○ WoD "Uteri Somnia": Arithmetica Cost 5. After dealing Active DMG, apply a Sacrifice that inflicts 50% of the damage to the target.
    ○ WoD "Blue-Ringed Toxin": Arithmetica Cost 2. After "Exalt," all enemies will receive a Sacrifice that inflicts 20% damage this turn after being actively attacked.
    ○ Posse "Wayward Ship": Apply 10 Sacrifice to all enemy units.
○ "Gluttony": Arithmetica Cost increased from 1 to 3, Strike DMG Boost decreased from 50% to 25%.
